summary: Phase 2 Deferred Slice 1 is accepted by the independent Claude Code CLI checker. The authorized deterministic behaviors were implemented: sleeping after idle, cursor peeking, edge nudges, and drag dizziness. Tests and the real-environment verifier passed, and no forbidden deferred or Phase 3 features were found.
evidence: scripts/verify-phase2-deferred1.ps1 returned passed=true in the real environment.
npm run build passed in the real environment.
src/shared/deferredPetBehavior.ts contains pure deterministic behavior calculations.

src/shared/deferredPetBehavior.test.ts contains 7 tests covering sleeping, blocked sleeping while dragging/exploding, cursor peeking, low-resource peeking suppression, edge nudges, drag dizziness, and dizziness recovery.
src/App.tsx integrates the behavior minimally with refs, one polling interval, speech bubbles, and CSS transform effects.
No todo/reminder, image pixelator, custom character manager, startup launch, hotkeys, backend, remote upload, sound packs, or plugin-like action system was implemented.
manual_verification_required: Pet visibly sleeps after idle threshold.
Pet peeks toward cursor when cursor is nearby.
Pet nudges away from screen edges.
Pet shows drag dizziness after fast or long drag.
